## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between ProjectMark and GrowthX to discuss content strategy updates and team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New team members (Prateek and Andrej) introduced to lead ProjectMark account](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Enhanced content strategy focusing on cluster-based approach, meta optimization, and interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Maintaining 10 articles/week cadence; balancing technical (requiring Tom's review) and general content](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Emphasis on data-backed claims and source linking to build trust in the construction industry](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

## Topics

### Team Changes and Strategy Updates

  - [Prateek and Andrej from GrowthX taking over ProjectMark account](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
  - [Continuing successful elements (e.g., content calendar, process) while introducing new strategies](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [Cluster-based content approach tailored to ProjectMark's ICPs and services](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [New Airtable tabs for tracking article metrics, best-ranking keywords, and optimization efforts](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)

### Content Production and Review Process

  - [Maintaining \~10 articles/week publishing cadence](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Balancing technical articles (requiring Tom's review) with general content for faster publication](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Agreed on Thursday/Friday for content review and publishing by Gus](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
  - [Emphasis on backing numerical data with source links to build reader trust](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### SEO and Performance Optimization

  - [Focus on meta optimization to improve click-through rates (CTRs)](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Interlinking strategy to boost new content and prevent orphaned pages](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Content refreshes for underperforming articles](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=717.0)
  - [Implementing SEO testing to track performance changes post-refresh (e.g., clicks, impressions, position)](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)

### Reporting and Communication

  - [Weekly Slack reports to be implemented, starting with meeting recaps](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Airtable updates to include detailed metrics and optimization tracking](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Open communication encouraged for pushing back on potential roadblocks](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Andrej to send Gus the updated Airtable link](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [GrowthX team to develop and share detailed content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Gus to share insights from client success cases for potential content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Implement weekly Slack reporting and meeting recaps](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Begin meta optimization and interlinking efforts](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [Set up SEO testing for ProjectMark on ContentKing platform](https://fathom.video/share/zBcQGqy3fK7Byciwmf1LkBzM6SLWV1Bc?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
